title: BorderTown
description: BorderTown is a multiplayer modpack inspired by the spirit of CrazyTown, but with its own unique identity.
body:
# 🌆 BorderTown — Community Modpack

**BorderTown** is a multiplayer modpack inspired by the spirit of **CrazyTown**, but with its own unique identity.  
The server is **open with a whitelist**, ensuring a safe and well-managed community environment.

## ⚙️ Concept
A balanced mix of technical, fun, and survival mods, designed to enhance group play.

## 🌍 Atmosphere
A lively world where each player can develop their base, contribute to collective projects, and take part in a dynamic local economy.

## 🔧 Mods
- Advanced and creative building  
- Automation and factories  
- Enhanced exploration and adventure  
- Detailed decoration and customization  
- Gameplay optimization without breaking vanilla balance  

## 🤝 Community
Whitelist-only access to maintain a friendly atmosphere and limit abuse.

## 🎯 Goal
Revive the **“semi-organized chaos”** energy of CrazyTown servers, but within a more stable, guided, and lasting environment.

---

## 📚 Sources / Credits
- [Easy NPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc)  
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
